creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
At the moment, USES=pyqt doesn't appear to allow this:

https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/Mk/Uses/pyqt.mk?revision=464266&view=markup#l32

It forces specifying 4 or 5 and errors if both are specified. I'm not sure what changes would be required to change that. So we have to pick one or else make another port for the other. Perhaps we should just switch to 5?
